# devin_idp_groups (Data Source)

Lists the IdP groups registered with the enterprise, e.g. to adopt existing groups when assigning roles with devin_enterprise_idp_group_role or devin_org_idp_group_role.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# IdP groups registered with the enterprise, e.g. to adopt existing groups
# without importing each devin_idp_group resource.
data "devin_idp_groups" "all" {}

output "idp_group_names" {
  value = [for g in data.devin_idp_groups.all.idp_groups : g.idp_group_name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `idp_groups` (Attributes List) IdP groups registered with the enterprise. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--idp_groups))

<a id="nestedatt--idp_groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `idp_groups`

Read-Only:

- `idp_group_name` (String) Name of the IdP group.
